code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, -val)
        else
          result = list.push(result, val)
        end
        has = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
      has = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -val)
    else
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let items = parse_line(line1)
let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
let target = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

let n = items.len()
mut found = false
mut fi = 0
mut fj = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  if not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n
      if not found
        let a = match items.get(i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        let b = match items.get(j)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if a + b == target
          found = true
          fi = i
          fj = j
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
else
  println("none")
end
